series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of these files is to retain the original copy of the executed agreement and subsequent modifications togather with all supporting documents leading up to the execution of the Agreement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: released by Administrator, Office of Contracts ; Paper: in office acceptance of final payment whereupon files are microfilmed and destroyed. agreements with stop work orders and projects with little or no project activity, as selected by Administrator, Office of Contracts, Office may files Records Center but such files above criteria has been met
